title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: CVE-2025-53521

sections.executive_summary: This report covers CVE-2025-53521 - a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P1_CRITICAL. CISA KEV confirms active exploitation. Zero-day signals detected. Affected sectors: Unknown.
